name: Iwasaki Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Iwasaki Electric Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells lighting products and industrial systems in Japan, North America, rest of Asia, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Lighting Sector; and Applied Optics and Environment Sector. The company provides light source products, such as LED lamps, ceramic metal halide lamps, metal halide lamps, high pressure sodium lamps, mercury products, and halogen lamps; and urbanscape, sports and floodlighting, and commercial and industrial lighting products. It also offers applied optics and environmental products that comprise environmental simulation systems, including high speed capture lighting products, solar simulation systems, and solar simulation photovoltaic products; UV/EB sterilization systems; water treatment systems; curing/cross-linking/polymerization systems; UV/EB cleaning systems; and light sources for special purposes. The company was formerly known as Iwasaki Radio Engineering and changed its name to Iwasaki Electric Co., Ltd. in 1945. Iwasaki Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
